name: User & Security Management
description: User accounts, access codes, security keys, menu assignments

items.name: XUS SIGNON SETUP
items.description: RPC ICR #1632 - API ICR #4054 Establishes the environment necessary for VistA sign-on.

items.name: XUS SEND KEYS
items.description: Returns an array of strings that are used in the hashing algorithm. The strings that are returned are picked up from Z^XUSRB.

items.name: XUS AV CODE
items.description: This API checks if a ACCESS/VERIFY code pair is valid. It returns an array of values   R(0)=DUZ if sign-on was OK, zero if not OK. R(1)=(0=OK, 1,2...=Can't sign-on for some reason). R(2)=verify needs changing. R(3)=Message. R(4)=0 R(5)=count of the number of lines of text, zero if none. R(5+n)=messa

items.name: XUS INTRO MSG
items.description: This RPC returns the INTRO message from the KERNEL SYSTEM PARAMETERS file.

items.name: XUS KEY CHECK
items.description: RPC ICR #6286 - API ICR #3277 This RPC will check if the user (DUZ) holds a security key or an array of keys. If a single security KEY is sent the result is returned in R(0). If an array is sent down then the return array has the same order as the calling array.

items.name: XUS CVC
items.description: RPC ICR #6296 - API ICR #none This RPC is used as part of Kernel to allow the user to change their verify code.

items.name: XUS AV HELP
items.description: Returns instructions on entering new access/verify codes.

items.name: XUS DIVISION SET
items.description: This RPC is used to set the user's selected Division in DUZ(2) during sign-on.

items.name: XUS GET USER INFO
items.description: Returns information about a user after logon.

items.name: XUS DIVISION GET
items.description: This RPC will return a list of divisions of a user.

items.name: XUS KAAJEE GET USER VIA PROXY
items.description: Returns a variety of information needed for KAAJEE logon based on the  ccow token

items.name: XUS KAAJEE GET CCOW TOKEN
items.description: This RPC gets a token to save in the CCOW context to aid in sign-on

items.name: XUS CCOW VAULT PARAM
items.description: This RPC returns a value for use with the CCOW vault.

items.name: XUS GET CCOW TOKEN
items.description: This RPC gets a token to save in the CCOW context to aid in sign-on.

items.name: XUS ALLKEYS
items.description: RPC ICR #6287 - API ICR #3277 This RPC will return all the KEYS that a user holds. If the FLAG is set to some value the list of KEYS will be screened to only be those for J2EE use. The RPC was designed for FATKAAT and KAAJEE (VistALink clients) but  may be used by other applications.

items.name: XUS SET VISITOR
items.description: This controlled-subscription RPC is used by the Broker Security Enhancement on an authenticating VistA system to obtain a BSE TOKEN for an authenticated active user. The TOKEN is used to identify and authenticate a visiting user on a remote VistA system, which calls back to the authenticating system

items.name: XUS GET VISITOR
items.description: This controlled-subscription RPC is used by the Broker Security  Enhancement to check a user's credentials based on a BSE TOKEN that was passed to identify and authenticate a visiting user. The remote VistA system calls this RPC on the authenticating VistA system to validate if the visiting user is

items.name: XUS KAAJEE GET USER INFO
items.description: Returns a variety of information needed for the KAAJEE logon.

items.name: XUS KAAJEE LOGOUT
items.description: This RPC calls the LOUT^XUSCLEAN tag to mark a KAAJEE-signed-on user's entry in the sign-on log as signed off.

items.name: XUS PKI GET UPN
items.description: This RPC gets the SUBJECT ALTERNATIVE NAME field from the New Person (#200) file field 501.2.  It is used to check that the correct PIV card has been put into the reader.

items.name: XUS PKI SET UPN
items.description: This RPC is used to set the SUBJECT ALTERNATIVE NAME in the New Person #(200) file field 501.2.

items.name: XUS IAM ADD USER
items.description: RPC ICR #6290 - API ICR #none This restricted RPC is used exclusively by the Identity and Access  Management (IAM) Provisioning application to add a user to the VistA NEW PERSON file (#200).   The XUSPF200 Security Key is required to add a user without an SSN (file #200 special privileges).

items.name: XUS IAM EDIT USER
items.description: RPC ICR #6291 - API ICR #none This restricted RPC is used exclusively by the Identity and Access  Management (IAM) Provisioning application to edit an existing user in the VistA NEW PERSON file (#200).   The XUSHOWSSN Security Key is required to edit Personally Identifiable Information (PII) such as

items.name: XUS IAM FIND USER
items.description: RPC ICR #6288 - API ICR #none This restricted RPC is used exclusively by the Identity and Access  Management (IAM) Provisioning application to find a list of users that  satisfy a collection of input criteria.   One or more of the input array values must be set by the calling  application. The XUSHO

items.name: XUS IAM DISPLAY USER
items.description: RPC ICE #6289 - API ICR #none This restricted RPC is used exclusively by the Identity and Access  Management (IAM) Provisioning application to display a VistA user.   The XUSHOWSSN Security Key is required to display Personally Identifiable Information (PII) such as Social Security Number (SSN) or D

items.name: XUS ESSO VALIDATE
items.description: RPC ICR #6295 - API ICR #none This API/RPC uses the VA Identity and Access Management (IAM) SAML token definition version 1.2 attributes from a SAML token for user sign-on.

items.name: XUS IAM BIND USER
items.description: RPC ICR #6294 - API ICR #none This restricted RPC is used exclusively by the Identity and Access  Management (IAM) Binding application to set the Security ID (SecID) and  Active Directory UPN (ADUPN) in the VistA NEW PERSON file (#200) for Single Sign-On Internal (SSOi).

items.name: XUS IAM TERMINATE USER
items.description: This restricted RPC is used exclusively by the Identity and Access  Management (IAM) Provisioning application to terminate an existing user  in the VistA NEW PERSON file (#200).

items.name: XUS IAM REACTIVATE USER
items.description: RPC ICR #6293 - API ICR #none This restricted RPC is used exclusively by the Identity and Access  Management (IAM) Provisioning application to reactivate an existing user  in the VistA NEW PERSON file (#200).

items.name: XUS BSE TOKEN
items.description: RPC ICR #6695 - API ICR #none   This API/RPC returns a string from the current user authentication that  can be used to authenticate the user on a visited system. The application is identified by a security phrase that, when hashed, matches the stored hash of an authorized application in the REMOT

items.name: XUS MVI NEW PERSON GET
items.description: This restricted RPC is used exclusively by the Master Veteran Index (MVI)  to retrieve data (by DUZ, SECID, NPI or SSN) from the VistA NEW PERSON  file (#200).

items.name: XUS MVI NEW PERSON UPDATE
items.description: This restricted RPC is used exclusively by the Master Veteran Index (MVI)  to update an entry (by DUZ) in the VistA NEW PERSON file (#200).

items.name: XUS MVI NEW PERSON DATA
items.description: This RPC will return calculated data analysis from NEW PERSON file (#200)  at VistA for user's selection criteria for active and non active NEW  PERSON entries.   Active New Person aggregated data for one or all below elements: SECID AUDPN (Email) NT USERNAME

items.name: XUS MVI ENRICH NEW PERSON
items.description: This restricted RPC is used exclusively by the Master Veteran Index (MVI)  to update enriched data in the VistA New Person File (#200).

items.name: XUS MVI NEW PERSON BULK GET
items.description: This restricted RPC is used exclusively by the Master Veteran Index (MVI) to retrieve data in bulk from the VistA NEW PERSON file (#200).

items.name: XUS IS USER ACTIVE
items.description: This API/RPC is used to check if a user is active, as defined in the  routine APIs $$ACTIVE^XUSER.

items.name: XUS MVI NEW PERSON RMTE AUDIT
items.description: This restricted RPC is used exclusively by the Master Veteran Index (MVI) to return audit data from the AUDIT (#1.1) file at a facility for a  specific user's record in the NEW PERSON (#200) file.

items.description: Returns an array of strings that are used in the hashing algorithm. The strings that are returned are picked up from Z^XUSRB.

items.name: XU REBUILD MENU TREE
items.description: This API rebuilds the menu trees and display nodes for a single user  (DUZ). It returns 0 if unsuccessful, 1 if successful.

items.name: XUS PKI GET UPN
items.description: This RPC gets the SUBJECT ALTERNATIVE NAME field from the New Person (#200) file field 501.2.  It is used to check that the correct PIV card has been put into the reader.

items.name: XUS PKI SET UPN
items.description: This RPC is used to set the SUBJECT ALTERNATIVE NAME in the New Person #(200) file field 501.2.

items.name: XU EPCS EDIT
items.description: This remote procedure stores information on editing changes in file 200 related to the electronic prescribing of controlled substances.

items.name: MPI VISTA HWS CONFIG
items.description: This Remote Procedure Call (RPC) will be used to update the following fields for the 'MPI_NEW_PSIM EXECUTE' entry in the WEB SERVER (#18.12) file in VistA:         - USERNAME      - PASSWORD      - SERVER      - SSL PORT      - SSL CONFIGURATION   In addition, the HTTPS parameter can be updated in t

items.name: XUS MVI NEW PERSON GET
items.description: This restricted RPC is used exclusively by the Master Veteran Index (MVI)  to retrieve data (by DUZ, SECID, NPI or SSN) from the VistA NEW PERSON  file (#200).

items.name: XUS MVI NEW PERSON UPDATE
items.description: This restricted RPC is used exclusively by the Master Veteran Index (MVI)  to update an entry (by DUZ) in the VistA NEW PERSON file (#200).

items.name: XUS MVI ENRICH NEW PERSON
items.description: This restricted RPC is used exclusively by the Master Veteran Index (MVI)  to update enriched data in the VistA New Person File (#200).

items.name: XUS MVI NEW PERSON BULK GET
items.description: This restricted RPC is used exclusively by the Master Veteran Index (MVI) to retrieve data in bulk from the VistA NEW PERSON file (#200).

items.name: XULM GET LOCK TABLE
items.description: This RPC is used by the Lock Manager to obtain the lock table on a specific node.  The lock table is returned in a global.

items.name: XULM KILL PROCESS
items.description: This RPC is used by the Kernel Lock Manager to terminate a process.

items.name: XUS IS USER ACTIVE
items.description: This API/RPC is used to check if a user is active, as defined in the  routine APIs $$ACTIVE^XUSER.
